mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive forward returns as capital flows into risk assets.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in 60% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate above 6.5% signals deteriorating consumer income and recession risk, triggering immediate equity sell-offs over the next week.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns remain positive in over 55% of triggered instances or the signal loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms robust aggregate demand, supporting corporate earnings growth and driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative 60-day returns in more than 50% of cases or the interaction term fails to improve model fit over additive baselines.

mechanism_narrative: Contraction in the industrial production index during a late-cycle expansion indicates supply bottlenecks and margin compression, forecasting negative monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses to positive in late-cycle regimes or the predictive accuracy drops below random chance (accuracy < 0.45) over rolling 5-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Low federal funds rates combined with stable employment levels create a liquidity surplus that fuels short-term speculative buying and positive weekly market returns.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative 5-day returns in over 60% of triggered periods or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts reflect increased household wealth and construction sector activity, generating sustained positive equity returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns are negative in more than 55% of observations or the series shows no significant autocorrelation with equity momentum.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial output alongside rising unemployment during a post-shock recovery phase confirms weak economic momentum, leading to negative monthly market performance.
failure_condition: The joint indicator fails to predict negative returns in post-shock environments or produces a positive signal in over 50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: High consumer price index levels above 210 trigger expectations of central bank intervention to stabilize markets, resulting in short-term positive equity rebounds.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns are negative in more than 60% of triggered instances or the threshold effect disappears when controlling for market volatility.
